description_long: This is a medium-sized, light tan dog with a short, smooth coat and a well-proportioned, athletic build. The dog is sitting upright with its front legs straight and hind legs bent, tail extended and gently curved along the ground. Its face is broad with a pronounced snout, dark eyes, and a black nose, while the ears are floppy and hang down the sides of the head. The chest is deep and the body tapers toward the hindquarters, giving the dog a streamlined appearance. A dark brown flat buckle collar is visible around its neck, contrasting with the lighter fur. The overall look suggests a friendly, attentive, and approachable companion, suitable for urban environments.
description: A medium-sized, light tan dog with a short coat, floppy ears, and a dark brown collar, sitting upright with a gently curved tail. The dog has a friendly, athletic appearance and a well-defined snout.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dog's symmetrical face, floppy ears, straight front legs, and dark brown collar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dog's profile, showing the snout, floppy ear, and the gentle curve of the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dog's back, hindquarters, and tail extending downward, with the collar partially visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the dog's profile, snout, and the relaxed position of the tail.
